checks.name: Schema
checks.details: manifest and 37 claims conform to Zod schemas

checks.name: Source provenance and hashes
checks.details: 62-page Zenodo PDF and TeX match the published SHA-256 values

checks.name: Formal references for theorem-level claims
checks.details: all theorem-level claims name formal declarations

checks.name: Falsification targets for open empirical claims
checks.details: all open empirical claims have test or failure criteria

checks.name: No interpretation or norm presented as theorem
checks.details: interpretive and normative claims remain typed separately

checks.name: No unguarded correlation/visualization/AI inference
checks.details: all high-risk inference classes carry explicit guards

checks.name: Retrocausality taxonomy coverage
checks.details: retrodiction, semantics, symmetry, ontology, signalling, and experiment are separated

checks.name: No unchecked Lean proof escape
checks.details: no unchecked proof escape in executable Lean code

checks.name: Formal references resolve
checks.details: every registered formal reference resolves to source

checks.name: Closed proof/empiricism policy
checks.details: empirical, interpretive, and normative layers cannot enter theorem status
